name: Guard Evasion
description: Torchlight sweeps the gatehouse passage in steady arcs. Two sentries pace the wall-walk above while a third guards the postern door. Timing, patience, and the cover of a moonless night are your only allies.
failureConsequence: A loose cobblestone betrays your step. The sentries close in and march you back to the town gate, barring re-entry until the next watch change.
